'''chozhazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bubblelike|bubblelike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bubblelike|bubblelike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chozhazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozhazithi|chozhazithi]] || [[word:chozhaziji|chozhaziji]] || [[word:chozhazishi|chozhazishi]] || [[word:chozhaziki|chozhaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozhazuthuthu|chozhazuthuthu]] || [[word:chozhazujuju|chozhazujuju]] || [[word:chozhazushushu|chozhazushushu]] || [[word:chozhazukuku|chozhazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozhazuthu|chozhazuthu]] || [[word:chozhazuju|chozhazuju]] || [[word:chozhazushu|chozhazushu]] || [[word:chozhazuku|chozhazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozhazufthuf|chozhazufthuf]] || [[word:chozhazufjuf|chozhazufjuf]] || [[word:chozhazufshuf|chozhazufshuf]] || [[word:chozhazufkuf|chozhazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozhazethe|chozhazethe]] || [[word:chozhazeje|chozhazeje]] || [[word:chozhazeshe|chozhazeshe]] || [[word:chozhazeke|chozhazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozhazothotho|chozhazothotho]] || [[word:chozhazojojo|chozhazojojo]] || [[word:chozhazoshosho|chozhazoshosho]] || [[word:chozhazokoko|chozhazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozhazotho|chozhazotho]] || [[word:chozhazojo|chozhazojo]] || [[word:chozhazosho|chozhazosho]] || [[word:chozhazoko|chozhazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozhazofthof|chozhazofthof]] || [[word:chozhazofjof|chozhazofjof]] || [[word:chozhazofshof|chozhazofshof]] || [[word:chozhazofkof|chozhazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfthĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfjĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfshĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfkĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfthĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfjĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfshĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfkĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfthĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfjĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfshĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhazĂŻfkĂŻf|chozhazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozhazĂŠthĂŠ|chozhazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chozhazĂŠjĂŠ|chozhazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chozhazĂŠshĂŠ|chozhazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chozhazĂŠkĂŠ|chozhazĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozhazathatha|chozhazathatha]] || [[word:chozhazajaja|chozhazajaja]] || [[word:chozhazashasha|chozhazashasha]] || [[word:chozhazakaka|chozhazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozhazatha|chozhazatha]] || [[word:chozhazaja|chozhazaja]] || [[word:chozhazasha|chozhazasha]] || [[word:chozhazaka|chozhazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozhazafthaf|chozhazafthaf]] || [[word:chozhazafjaf|chozhazafjaf]] || [[word:chozhazafshaf|chozhazafshaf]] || [[word:chozhazafkaf|chozhazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chozhazasha|chozhazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozhazshĂ«sha|chozhazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozhazrosha|chozhazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozhazmusha|chozhazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozhazyasha|chozhazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozhaznkshĂ«sha|gochozhaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozhaznkrosha|gochozhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozhaznkmusha|gochozhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozhaznkyasha|gochozhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chozhazhazasha|chozhazhazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozhazhazshĂ«sha|chozhazhazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozhazhazrosha|chozhazhazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozhazhazmusha|chozhazhazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozhazhazyasha|chozhazhazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozhazhaznkshĂ«sha|gochozhazhaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozhazhaznkrosha|gochozhazhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozhazhaznkmusha|gochozhazhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozhazhaznkyasha|gochozhazhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chezhĂŠzasha|chezhĂŠzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chezhĂŠzshĂ«sha|chezhĂŠzshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chezhĂŠzrosha|chezhĂŠzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chezhĂŠzmusha|chezhĂŠzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chezhĂŠzyasha|chezhĂŠzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochezhĂŠznkshĂ«sha|gochezhĂŠznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochezhĂŠznkrosha|gochezhĂŠznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochezhĂŠznkmusha|gochezhĂŠznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochezhĂŠznkyasha|gochezhĂŠznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chozhfazasha|chozhfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozhfazshĂ«sha|chozhfazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozhfazrosha|chozhfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozhfazmusha|chozhfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozhfazyasha|chozhfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozhfaznkshĂ«sha|gochozhfaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozhfaznkrosha|gochozhfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozhfaznkmusha|gochozhfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozhfaznkyasha|gochozhfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
